titleStmt.title: SII 15.16: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 16. (B.K. No. 450 of 1926.) MADANBHĀVI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Rāmaliṅga temple.

The inscription contains two dates. The first is Chālukya-Vikrama year 52, Kāḷayukti, Kārttika śu. 10, Monday. The date is defective. The details correspond to 1138 A.D., October 15, the weekday being Saturday. But, for Kāḷayukti, the Chālukya-Vikrama year would be 62. The second is Pramādi, Māgha-amāvāsye, Sunday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1134 A.D., January 27. The week-day, however, was Saturday. This date is earlier than the first one by four years.

It records a gift of land to the god Svayaṁbhu Kalidēva of Mandūr by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Jayakēśi II of the Kadamba family of Goa. Jayakēśi whose usual Kadamba praśasti is recounted and who is mentioned as Koṅkaṇa-chakravarti, is said to have been ruling the kingdom from Bhōgūru with his crowned queen Maiḷaladēvī, Yuvarāja Permāḍi and prince Vijayāditya. The gift was made after visiting the said place as a consummation of his vow of observing the Mondays.

On the second date is registered a gift of income from the Pannāya tax on the god's garden in favour of the above deity by Suṅkada-pergaḍe Śankarayya-nāyaka. Some more gifts are mentioned in the earlier lines of the epigraph which are much damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

śīti nagarādhiṣṭhitāṣṭādaśāśvamēdha

gaḷu duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapra
ḍinoḷu vijayarājya
nāthi
ṣṭhāyaka śatānandamukunda �kā
bhīṣṭaphaḷadāyaka pratya raṁgabhōgenai
vēdyādi samasta pūjā geṟeyēri
yiṁ paḍuvali¨rdda gaddeyu yalaya yeletō
ṭamumanūriṁ mūḍaṇa nivē �mūḍa
ṇōreya hūdōṁṭada bayalu yama
dhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhā śrīsvayaṁ bhūdē
va pādārādhakarumappa pū¨rvvakaṁ mā
ḍi biṭṭaru mattaṁ caitra pavitraveraḍakke gadyāṇa 1 pe¨rggeḍe paṇa
sēnabōva paṇa 1 Aṁgaḍiyalli ka¨rmmāṟaṁ pāga 2
maḍivāḷaṁ pāga 2 talligaralli mane biṭṭaru mayvaga 2
gātrada da¨rśa� pāga 1 haḍige talevoṁ tōṭa pāga 2 leyalli ndara paṇa 1
Intinitāyamaṁ sama ṇḍugaḷu tami¨rddu sa¨rvvanamaśyadiṁ sa¨rvvabā
dhāparihāra māḍi koṭṭaru mattamīdha¨rmmaṁ I relu . svasti samastarājāvaḷī virājitarappa koṁkaṇa
cakrava¨rtti jayakēsidēvarasaruṁ paṭṭamahādēvi maiḷalamahādēviyaruṁ yuva rāja pe¨rmmāḍidēvanuṁ
vijayādityakumāra sahitaṁ bhōgūranelevīḍinoḷu sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttami¨rddu .
cāḷukyavikramakālada 52 neya kāḷayukti saṁvatsarada kā¨rttika śu 10 sōma vāradandu mandūra svayaṁ
bhu kalidēvarallige sōmavārada vāriyāgi[¨rdda] bratōdyāpanasamayadoḷu bandu dēvaraṁgabhōgakke mugu
ḷiya holasīme mandūra holasīme mēreyāgire ṇa bhūmiyoḷu hiriyakōlalāṟu
mattaru bhūmiyaṁ sa¨rbbabādhāparihāramāgi biṭṭaru [Intī dha¨rmmamaṁ] svadha¨rmmanāvanō¨rvvaṁ prapāḷisidaṁ
ge gaṁge gaye kēdāra vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgayeṁba mahātī¨rtthaṁgaḷa taḍiyoḷu sāyira kavileya
kōḍukoḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṁgaḷoḷu kaṭṭisi catu¨rvvēdapāragarappa sāyira sabrāhma ṇa¨rgga koṭṭa mahāphaḷavakku .
Intī dha¨rmavanāvanō¨rvvanaḷidavaṁganituṁ tī¨rtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāyirakavileyaṁ sāyira sa brāhmaṇaranaḷida paṁcamahā
pātakamakku . ślōka . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁndharāṁ ṣaṣṭhiṁ va¨rṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . bahubhi¨rvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādhibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ .
kandha . paramasvayaṁbhukalidēvarigī śāsanamanesaye tāṁ māḍisidaṁ varaguṇanidhi nega¨rda saṁkara bammeya nāyakaṁ
kṛtā¨rtthaṁ jagadoḷ . rūvārikumudacaṁdraṁ bhāvakarūvārivārijakkaṁ mattaṁ rūvārivārijōbbhavanī vasumatiyoḷagati
pracaṇḍaṁ cauṇḍa . v® . sale maṁdūra gavuṇḍanākaṇiya cauvuṇḍaṁge satputranī baladēvaṁ śivapādapadmamadhupaṁ mandūroḷaṁ śaṁbhuvī kali
dēvaṁgatibhaktiyinde besageydī śāsanaṁ nilke tāṁ nelanuṁ nēsaṟumuḷḷinaṁ tolagadinnā caṁdratāraṁbaraṁ . © .
mattaṁ pramādi saṁvatsarada māghadamavāsya Ādivāra sū¨ryyagrahaṇadandu mandūra śrī svayaṁbhudē
vara nandādīvigegaṁ caitrapavitrakkaṁ śrīmatu suṁkada pe¨rggaḍe śaṁkarayyanāyakaru dēvara tōṭada kuḷiya
suṁka baṭṭe pannāyamaṁ sa¨rvvanamasyamāgi biṭṭarintī dha¨rmmamaṁ suṁkamaṁ paḍedadhikāri gaḷsaddha¨rmmadiṁ naḍeyisu[varu .]
Digital edition of SII 15.16 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
